chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1301 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has already approached respondent No.3, the Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur, by filing an application, which is available at page No.11 as Annexure-A. However, the said application has not yet been decided. It is contended that the continued inaction on the part of the concerned authority has constrained the petitioner to invoke the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court for seeking appropriate relief. Conversely, learned Assistant Advocate General submits that the controversy involved in the matter may suitably be resolved by directing respondent No.3 to decide the petitioner’s aforesaid application strictly in accordance with law and the applicable rules within a stipulated time, and that no further directions are required at this stage. In view of the above submissions, and without expressing any opinion on the merits of the case, the instant constitutional petition is disposed of. However, respondent No.3, the Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur, is directed to take up and decide the petitioner’s application, if the same is still pending, by passing a speaking order strictly in accordance with law within a period of thirty days from the date of receipt of this order. Thereafter, respondent No.3 shall submit a compliance report before this Court through the Additional Registrar for perusal.

However, respondent No.3, the Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur, is directed to take up and decide the petitioner’s application, if the same is still pending, by passing a speaking order strictly in accordance with law within a period of thirty days from the date of receipt of this order. Thereafter, respondent No.3 shall submit a compliance report before this Court through the Additional Registrar for perusal. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
